title: GSC Exchange v1 — lamill → rankmill
description: Per-URL Google Search Console index state for one domain. Written by lamill (producer), read by rankmill (consumer). See docs/contracts/gsc-exchange.md.

schema.description: Contract version. Consumer MUST reject an unrecognized major.

domain.description: Bare domain; MUST equal the site directory name.

property.description: The GSC property the data came from (provenance), e.g. `sc-domain:donready.xyz` or `https://donready.xyz/`.

fetched_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 with trailing Z. Drives consumer freshness.

source.description: Which GSC API produced `pages`. v1 = URL Inspection only.

error.description: Top-level error when the whole pull failed (e.g. not a verified property). When set, `pages` MAY be empty.

pages.description: One record per inspected URL. MAY be empty (degrade, not error).

verdict.description: GSC inspection verdict for the URL.

coverage_state.description: GSC human coverage string, e.g. 'Submitted and indexed', 'URL is unknown to Google', 'Crawled - currently not indexed', 'Discovered - currently not indexed', 'Excluded by noindex tag', 'Blocked by robots.txt', 'Duplicate without user-selected canonical'. Consumer MUST treat unknown strings gracefully.

page_fetch_state.description: e.g. SUCCESSFUL, SOFT_404, BLOCKED_ROBOTS_TXT, NOT_FOUND, ACCESS_DENIED, SERVER_ERROR, REDIRECT_ERROR.

last_crawl_time.description: UTC ISO-8601 of Google's last crawl, or null if never crawled.
